Description: Description
Precondition: Precondition
Steps: Steps | Expected: Expected Result

Description: Verify the “Register as Voluntary Contributor” service appears in the service list
Precondition: User is logged in as an eligible Saudi citizen (age 18‑65, inactive contributor)
Steps: 1. Navigate to the service list. 2. Search for “Register as Voluntary Contributor”. | Expected: The service “Register as Voluntary Contributor” is displayed.

Description: Verify an ineligible user receives a popup message when trying to access the service
Precondition: User is logged in but is ineligible (e.g., non‑Saudi, age <18, age >65, or active contributor)
Steps: 1. Attempt to select the “Register as Voluntary Contributor” service. | Expected: A popup message appropriate to the ineligibility reason appears (e.g., “المشترك لديه مدة اشتراك نشيطة…”).

Description: Verify the registration form is displayed for an eligible user
Precondition: Eligible user selects the service
Steps: 1. Click on “Register as Voluntary Contributor”. | Expected: The registration form (Engagement Details step) is displayed.

Description: Verify the “Purpose of Registration” dropdown is populated based on business logic
Precondition: User is on the registration form
Steps: 1. Locate the “Purpose of Registration” field. | Expected: The dropdown shows the correct purposes (Freelancer, Establishment Owner, Annuity Eligibility, Annuity Upgrade) according to the user’s contribution history.

Description: Verify the “Submission Date” is auto‑populated
Precondition: User is on the registration form
Steps: 1. Observe the “Submission Date” field. | Expected: The field is automatically filled with the current date (or the business‑defined date).

Description: Verify only eligible wages are highlighted/available in the wage selection
Precondition: User has a previous mandatory engagement
Steps: 1. Open the “Wage” dropdown. | Expected: Only wages eligible for the user’s last engagement are highlighted or enabled.

Description: Verify selecting an ineligible wage displays a reason form from the backend
Precondition: User selects a wage outside the eligible range
Steps: 1. Choose an ineligible wage. | Expected: A reason/form explaining ineligibility appears, sourced from the backend.

Description: Verify wage updates are allowed each year and become effective in January
Precondition: Current date is after January of the next calendar year
Steps: 1. Attempt to update the wage for a future year. | Expected: The update is accepted and will be effective from January of the selected year.

Description: Verify health‑record questions are displayed as checkboxes
Precondition: User reaches Step 3 (Health Record Details)
Steps: 1. View the health‑record section. | Expected: Each medical question appears as a checkbox.

Description: Verify selecting “Yes” on any medical item moves the transaction to workflow
Precondition: User checks “Yes” on a medical question
Steps: 1. Check “Yes” for any medical item. 2. Submit the health‑record step. | Expected: The request status changes to “Pending workflow” or similar.

Description: Verify that no medical selections result in auto‑approval
Precondition: User leaves all medical checkboxes unchecked
Steps: 1. Submit the health‑record step without any “Yes”. | Expected: The request is auto‑approved without manual review.

Description: Verify the user must agree to the disclaimer to proceed
Precondition: User is on the health‑record step
Steps: 1. Try to proceed without checking the disclaimer checkbox. | Expected: An error message prompts the user to accept the disclaimer.

Description: Verify a freelancer must upload a supporting document
Precondition: User selects “Freelancer” as the purpose
Steps: 1. Attempt to submit without uploading the freelancer document. | Expected: An error message requires the document upload.

Description: Verify no document upload is required for non‑freelancer without medical issues
Precondition: User selects a purpose other than Freelancer and has no medical “Yes”
Steps: 1. Submit the request without a document. | Expected: The request is accepted without a document upload.

Description: Verify the review step displays a summary of entered data
Precondition: User completes all previous steps
Steps: 1. Reach the review page. | Expected: All entered details (engagement, wage, health, documents) are displayed for confirmation.

Description: Verify successful submission shows a confirmation message with request ID
Precondition: All required data is correctly filled and submitted
Steps: 1. Click “Submit”. | Expected: A confirmation message appears containing the request ID.

Description: Verify failed submission displays an error message from the backend
Precondition: Backend returns an error (e.g., network failure)
Steps: 1. Submit the request. | Expected: An error message from the backend is displayed (e.g., “Server error, please try again”).

Description: Verify validation message for an active GOSI engagement
Precondition: User has an active mandatory engagement with GOSI
Steps: 1. Attempt to register as VIC. | Expected: Popup message: “المشترك لديه مدة اشتراك نشيطة، لا يمكن إضافته كمشترك اختياري” (Person has an active engagement...).

Description: Verify validation message for age less than 18
Precondition: User is under 18 years old
Steps: 1. Try to register. | Expected: Popup message: “الشخص أقل من 18 عام، لا يمكن تسجيله كمشترك اختياري”.

Description: Verify validation message for age greater than 65
Precondition: User is over 65 years old
Steps: 1. Try to register. | Expected: Popup message: “الشخص أكبر من 65 عام، لا يمكن تسجيله كمشترك اختياري”.

Description: Verify validation message for NIC data mismatch
Precondition: NIC does not match the user’s information
Steps: 1. Attempt to register. | Expected: Popup message: “لا يوجد بيانات مطابقة في مركز المعلومات الوطني”.

Description: Verify validation message for a deceased person
Precondition: User is recorded as deceased in NIC
Steps: 1. Try to register. | Expected: Popup message: “الشخص متوفي، لا يمكن إضافته كمشترك اختياري”.

Description: Verify validation message for a government employee
Precondition: User is a government employee
Steps: 1. Try to register. | Expected: Popup message: “الشخص موظف حكومي، لا يمكن تسجيله كمشترك اختياري”.

Description: Verify validation message when NIC service is down
Precondition: NIC service is unavailable after three attempts
Steps: 1. Attempt to register. | Expected: Popup message: “لا يمكن التحقق من مركز المعلومات الوطني، بأمل المحاولة لاحقا”.
